title: What is mishpat? מִשְׁפָּט
author: joshualinog
content:
# WHAT IS MISHPAT? מִשְׁפָּט

- pulsing, like a heart beat, like blood pulsing, giving life, relifing....
- is calling mishpat pulsing creating a wrongheaded temporal association with the heartbeat? like it is needed more frequently for relifing than it actually is?
- what about eating? like food? is mishpat like giving life, relifing via eating a better metaphor/mashal?
